name: Ghostmon

signature_move.name: Little Plasma
signature_move.description: Fires weak energy shots from its palms.

description: A Ghost Digimon that is often witnessed flying over graveyards. Although it doesn't like to show its face due to its timidness and shyness, it is a kind-hearted Digimon that helps those in need, while turning invisible so as not to be noticed by them. When it is forced into battle, it moves about cunningly using its " Little Plasma ", in which it fires weak energy shots from its palms, and " Jack Raid ", where it turns invisible moments before charging and crashing into the enemy, then striking them from behind while they are still in a state of confusion.
